headline: Entergy (ETR) Price Target Trimmed by $7
summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is included among the 15 Best Nuclear Power Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) delivers electricity and gas services to 3 million utility customers in Arkansas, Louisiana, Mississippi, and Texas. On May 21, Morgan Stanley trimmed its price target on Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) from $101 to $94, […]
